The '''Battle of [[Razor Coast]]''' was a skirmish in the [[Battle of Jabiim]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In it, [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Leska]] managed to capture the [[Jabiimi Nationalists|Jabiimi Nationalist]] command center, but at a high amount of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] casualties.

{{Battle-stub}}
